overall.description: A static first-person view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out a large window at a futuristic industrial cityscape. The scene features high-fidelity game engine graphics with dramatic morning lighting, and includes a brief appearance of flying vehicles. This is footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking out the window at the futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window overlooking the city with metal frame
unmade bed with white rumpled sheets and blankets in the foreground
black and white checkered tile pattern on the interior wall
dense futuristic urban environment with multiple high-rise buildings and industrial structures
tall cylindrical industrial tower with multiple platforms and antennas
rectangular overhead light fixture emitting greenish artificial light

segments.scene_description: A static view from inside a futuristic apartment bedroom, looking out a large window at an industrial cityscape. The room features a messy bed in the foreground and checkered walls, while morning sunlight illuminates the distant towers and buildings outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: flying vehicles appear outside the window and fly past the city view

notable_agents.action: flying past the window from left to right at high altitude

segments.scene_description: Flying vehicles suddenly appear outside the window, moving across the cityscape view. The camera remains stationary as the cars fly past, adding motion to the otherwise static cyberpunk city view.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the static cityscape view from the apartment

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicles have exited the frame, returning to the static view of the bedroom and cityscape. The scene resumes its calm observation of the futuristic urban environment outside the window for the remainder of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective from a futuristic bedroom that transitions from a quiet morning observation to a moment of urban activity and back to stillness. It begins with a view of a messy bed and checkered walls, looking out a large window toward an industrial cityscape bathed in morning sunlight. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is interrupted by flying vehicles that suddenly glide across the frame, introducing dynamic motion to the distant towers and buildings. Once the vehicles exit the view, the environment shifts back to its original state of calm. The shot finally settles into a steady observation of the sprawling cyberpunk urban landscape outside the window.
